{{Expand}}

{{Infobox artifact
| name = Blackflame cannon
| introduced = cradle-06-underlord
}}

== Underlord ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Kiro]]'s brother faced a [[Blackflame cannon]].<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c20">''Underlord'', chapter 20</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Artifacts]]
[[Category:Underlord]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle artifacts]]
